title: Implicitly unwrapped optionals on P7SpecItem properties
description: P7SpecItem declares name, id, and spec as implicitly unwrapped optionals (String!, P7Spec!). The description property at line 27 force-unwraps both self.id! and self.name!. If any SpecItem is constructed with a nil id (which is possible since attributes['id'] is optional), calling description on it will crash.
recommendation: Use nil-coalescing: return "[\(self.id ?? '?')] \(self.name ?? '?')" or change to non-optional properties.
